theoremName: adjoint Green endpoint range interval consequence theorem

exactFundamentalMatrixEndpointMapStatus.label: exact fundamental-matrix endpoint map
exactFundamentalMatrixEndpointMapStatus.reason: The endpoint range theorem reduces active endpoint compatibility to the finite endpoint map.

endpointFredholmRangeAlternativeStatus.label: endpoint Fredholm range alternative
endpointFredholmRangeAlternativeStatus.reason: The endpoint range theorem identifies solvability with the finite Fredholm range condition.

endpointGreenBvpSolvabilityStatus.label: endpoint Green BVP solvability
endpointGreenBvpSolvabilityStatus.reason: The synchronized endpoint interval certificate makes the active endpoint Fredholm obstruction vacuous.

uniformTraceDualBoundFromCompactnessStat.label: uniform trace-dual endpoint bound
uniformTraceDualBoundFromCompactnessStat.reason: The endpoint range theorem supplies the uniform trace-dual bound needed for closure.
